translation: he who perseveres, succeeds / persistence pays off
example_sentence: Sigue estudiando — el que persevera, alcanza.
El viaje fue difícil, pero valió la pena.
example_translation: The trip was difficult, but it was worth it.

example_sentence: Los tapatíos son famosos por ser excelentes anfitriones.
example_translation: People from Guadalajara are famous for being excellent hosts.

translation: to take time / to take long
example_sentence: Tardé dos horas en llegar por el tráfico.
example_translation: It took me two hours to arrive because of traffic.

example_sentence: Resultó que ella conocía a mi hermano.
example_translation: It turned out she knew my brother.

example_sentence: Nuestros amigos fueron el anfitrión perfecto — había comida para todos.
example_translation: Our friends were the perfect hosts — there was food for everyone.
With practice, you will overcome any difficulty.

example_sentence: Aprender español me ayudó a conectar con personas increíbles.
example_translation: Learning Spanish helped me connect with incredible people.

translation: the buñuelo (crispy fried dough — a Christmas treat)
example_sentence: En las posadas siempre hay buñuelos con piloncillo.
example_translation: At posadas there are always buñuelos with piloncillo syrup.

translation: to make an effort / to try hard
example_sentence: Si te esfuerzas, hablarás español con fluidez.
example_translation: If you make an effort, you'll speak Spanish fluently.

example_sentence: Lograr fluidez requiere práctica constante y exposición al idioma.
example_translation: Achieving fluency requires constant practice and exposure to the language.

translation: come on, yes you can! / you've got this!
example_sentence: ¡Ándale, sí se puede! Ya casi terminas el nivel B1.
example_translation: Come on, you've got this! You're almost done with B1.
